title: hieracium dentatum subsp. cenisium
intro: Hieracium dentatum subsp. cenisium, also known as the Alps hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, kidney stones, and skin conditions, due to its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and promote urine production. The herbal preparations of Hieracium dentatum subsp. cenisium include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for topical and internal use.
